## Checks

### Normal Checks

- [ ] Format
- [ ] UCI behavior
- [ ] `.exe` works

### Regression Tests

- [ ] Mate in 2 100% pass
- [ ] Mate in 3, 4 pass
- [ ] Mate in 5 75% pass
- [ ] basic test 5837 / 6000 pass
- [ ] hard test pass
- [ ] very hard test pass

### AB Tests

- [ ] No elo regression or invalid moves when playing 1000 games.
